title: ProbabilityObject
description: Versioned contract for probability predictions in HandicapLab.

probability_version.description: Version of the probability contract schema used.

raw_probability.description: The raw probability output by the base model.

confidence_interval.description: [Lower bound, Upper bound] of the confidence interval.

uncertainty_score.description: Overall uncertainty score for the prediction.

epistemic_uncertainty.description: Uncertainty due to lack of knowledge (model uncertainty).

aleatoric_uncertainty.description: Uncertainty due to inherent noise (data uncertainty).

brier_score.description: Brier score for the underlying model/calibration.

log_loss.description: Log loss for the underlying model/calibration.

reliability_bucket.description: The reliability bucket this prediction falls into.

risk_flags.description: Array of risk flags identified for this prediction.

feature_attribution.description: Key-value pairs of feature names and their attribution scores.
